calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-21-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Mar-26-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'s motion to deem admitted the truth of any matters specified in its Requests for Admission is granted. Defendant Nhan H. Truong failed to timely respond to this discovery and has thereby waived objections. (CCP 2033.280(a).) The truth of any matters specified in the RFAs, and the genuineness of any documents attached, is deemed admitted by Defendant. (CCP 2033.280(b), (c).)

Plaintiff does not seek sanctions. But sanctions are mandatory in this circumstance. (CCP 2033.280(c) ["It is mandatory that the court impose a monetary sanction under Chapter 7 (commencing with Section 2023.010) on the party or attorney, or both, whose failure to serve a timely response to requests for admission necessitated this motion."].) The court awards sanctions of $100 payable by Defendant to Plaintiff within 10 court days of entry of this order.

Order is signed.

Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Set For Trial On Jul-14-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
